consent_or_safety_note: PLACEHOLDER - state who authored/approved this non-pupil test sample and confirm no pupil/school/assessment material is involved
anonymisation_note: PLACEHOLDER - confirm the image contains Braille only: no names, handwriting, faces, labels, logos, or identifying file/EXIF metadata
lighting_note: PLACEHOLDER - e.g. 'even diffuse daylight' or 'gentle side light for embossed dots'
device_note: PLACEHOLDER - generic device description only, e.g. 'flatbed scanner, 300 dpi'; never serial numbers or personal identifiers
crop_note: PLACEHOLDER - confirm the image is cropped to the Braille-only region
verifier_role: PLACEHOLDER - who verified the expected .braille cells, e.g. 'Braille-literate specialist' or 'brf_cell_source'
